entries.institution_detail: School of Information Studies · College of Arts and Sciences
entries.degree: B.S. Applied Data Analytics · B.A. Psychology · Minor in Business Management

bullets: Design all artwork using Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator
Coordinate with clients and negotiate specifications
Build automated systems for customer contact and order management using Excel
Optimize physical screen-printing process to produce 120 shirts per hour, reducing manual labor
Manage finances, inventory, and operational logistics
Achieved 77% gross profit margin and $3,000+ in revenue
Directed recruitment marketing across Instagram and the chapter website, increasing chapter visibility
Led philanthropy promotion through digital engagement and merchandise sales, contributing to chapter’s record-breaking $155,000 fundraising effort

entries.name: Music Library Digitization
bullets: Built ETL pipeline digitizing a CD library into 1.5TB archive of over 50,000 lossless audio tracks
Automated conversion and tagging workflow using bash scripting to minimize manual processing time
Utilized web scraping system to ensure metadata veracity
Optimized storage through WAV-to-FLAC compression while maintaining fidelity

entries.name: City of Syracuse Service Requests Analysis
bullets: Collaborated with a team to analyze 60,000+ municipal service requests using R
Identified drivers behind response times and resolution efficiency
Engineered features including response-time metrics and mobile reporting indicators to support association rules mining and linear regression modeling
Built geospatial visualizations mapping request density and closure speed across Syracuse zip codes
Lead 4-person band with regular performances at Central NY venues; developed 2-hour repertoire
Direct rehearsals, coordinate performance execution, and manage ensemble cohesion
Recorded and released multiple singles; built dedicated local following
